## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Reproduction Steps

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, panic output, or incorrect routing results.

## Environment

- **Rust version:** (output of `rustc --version`)

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or minimal reproduction code here.
